descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 42 for sale 2020 | 3 Guest Cabins - Owner's Version | Vat Paid

This Lagoon 42 for sale 2020 in Athens, Greece, presents an appealing opportunity for liveaboard enthusiasts and long-distance sailors alike. Registered under the French flag with VAT paid, this vessel benefits from careful ownership, having never been chartered and maintained to a high standard.

The catamaran is thoughtfully equipped for living aboard and longer passages, featuring modern upgrades including lithium batteries, Victron energy management, and solar panels. The addition of a watermaker supports off-grid cruising, while the upgraded sail inventory—with Code 0 and asymmetric spinnaker—provides sailing versatility.

(Autopilot, Radar, Plotter, Inverter, Solar Panels, Watermaker, Davits, Tender...)

Specifications at a Glance

  • Location: Athens, Greece
  • Year: 2020
  • Length overall: 12.8 m
  • Maximum draught: 1.25 m
  • Beam: 7.68 m
  • Flag of Registry: France
  • Tax Status: VAT Paid
  • Dry Weight: 12,104 kg
  • Displacement: 18 t
  • Fuel tank: 600 l
  • Water tank: 600 l
  • Holding tank capacity: 240 l
  • Cruising speed: 6-7 knots
  • Maximum speed: 12 knots

Engine

  • Make: Yanmar
  • Model: 4JH57
  • Year: 2020
  • Power: 57 hp
  • Motor hours: 1000
  • Propellers: Fixed
  • Drive type: Sail Drive

Sail Inventory

  • Fully battened mainsail
  • Furling Genoa
  • Gennaker / Cruising Spinnaker
  • Asymmetric Spinnaker

Electronics

  • Depth sounder
  • Log speed
  • Wind speed and direction
  • Chartplotter
  • Autopilot
  • Compass
  • GPS
  • VHF
  • Radar
  • Computer
  • TV
  • Cockpit speakers

Interior Equipment

  • Washing machine
  • Oven
  • Microwave
  • Marine and electric heads
  • Refrigerator
  • Deep freezer
  • Battery charger
  • Electric and manual bilge pumps
  • Hot water
  • Fresh water maker
  • Sea water pump

Electrical & Rigging

  • Shore power inlet
  • Inverter
  • Steering wheel
  • Electric winch
  • Spinnaker pole

Exterior Features

  • Teak cockpit
  • Gangway
  • Solar panels
  • Cockpit cushions
  • Swimming ladder
  • Cockpit shower
  • Davits
  • Tender
  • Liferaft
  • Cockpit table

Covers

  • Bimini top
  • Mainsail cover
  • Cockpit cover
  • Sprayhood
  • Lazy bag
  • Lazy jacks

This Lagoon 42 for sale 2020 represents a straightforward ownership history with just one previous owner and no commercial charter use. With VAT paid and a possibility to continue the current leasing (subject to eligibility), it provides an accessible route into European cruising. The vessel is in good condition and is well-equipped for extended voyaging or living aboard in comfort. If you’re looking for a reliable and well-specified Lagoon 42, available in Athens, this boat is worth your serious consideration.
